subtitles.original: 生誕ライブ、それでイェーイ！
subtitles.english: Let's go to my Birthday Live, yay!

subtitles.original: ちょっとめちゃめちゃに緊張しているんですけれども
subtitles.english: I am incredibly nervous, but...

subtitles.original: どうだった？群青のアイリスアウト
subtitles.english: How was it? "Gunjou no Iris Out"

subtitles.original: コメント欄どうだった？かっこよかった？
subtitles.english: How was the comment section? Was it cool?

subtitles.original: かっこよかったってきっと。まあこの後流れるんだろうな
subtitles.english: It must have been cool, surely. Well, it'll probably flow in later.

subtitles.original: かっこよかっただろ？
subtitles.english: It was cool, right?

subtitles.original: いっぱい褒めてください。
subtitles.english: Please praise me a lot.

subtitles.original: 今回はですね、タイトルにもある通り...
subtitles.english: This time, as you can see in the title...

subtitles.original: もうステップが、もうハチャメチャにもステップが、ステップが、もうハチャメチャに多かったりですね
subtitles.english: The steps are just... there are incredibly so many steps, so many steps!

subtitles.original: あとは、やったことのないジャンルのダンスにも挑戦しちゃったりしていますので、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: And also, I'm challenging myself with genres of dance I've never done before, so look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグは、こちらにあるハッシュタグ「#水宮スイ生誕祭2026」です！
subtitles.english: The hashtag is this hashtag right here, #MizumiyaSuiBirthdayFestival2026!

subtitles.original: スクショとか感想とかたくさんポストしてくれると嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if you posted lots of screenshots and thoughts!

subtitles.original: 目指せトレンド！みんな、いっぱい通ってねー！
subtitles.english: Aim for trending! Everyone, post lots!

subtitles.original: この後はですね、ゲストパートにも行きたいと思っているの。ですが...
subtitles.english: After this, I want to go to the guest part... However...

subtitles.original: なんと、お祝いの映像が届いてるみたいなので、見てみましょう！
subtitles.english: Wait, it seems a celebratory video has arrived, so let's take a look!

subtitles.original: こっちかな？よし。
subtitles.english: Is it this way? Okay.

subtitles.original: なんだなんだ？
subtitles.english: What is it, what is it?

subtitles.original: キミを笑顔にご案内！南風の観光大使、にじさんじ所属、彩木の子の末っ子、シガリコだよ！
subtitles.english: Guiding you to smiles! South wind tourism ambassador, Nijisanji-affiliated, youngest child of Ayakoki, I'm Shigariko!

subtitles.original: 水宮、お誕生日おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Mizumiya, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: きっと今、水宮は最高のライブをしていることでしょう。本当におめでとう！
subtitles.english: Surely right now, Mizumiya is having the best live concert. Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: 本当はね、現地で直接お祝いがしたかったんですけど、どうしてもスケジュールが合わないということで...
subtitles.english: Actually, I wanted to celebrate directly at the venue, but my schedule just didn't work out...

subtitles.original: お祝いのメッセージ動画をね、今回送らせていただいております。
subtitles.english: so I'm sending this celebratory message video instead.

subtitles.original: 水宮とはね、ロロメロとしてたくさんコラボして、プライベートとかでもテーマパーク行ったりとか...
subtitles.english: With Mizumiya, we've collabed a lot as Lolomelo, and in private we've gone to theme parks...

subtitles.original: 映画行ったりとか、月一でお泊まりするくらい仲良くさせてもらってて...
subtitles.english: movies, and even did sleepovers about once a month, we've gotten so close...

subtitles.original: 本当にいつもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much as always!

subtitles.original: 事務所が違うのにこんなに仲良くなれるなんて、もうめっちゃ嬉しいし...
subtitles.english: Even though our agencies are different, being able to get this close makes me so happy...

subtitles.original: いつも水宮に元気もらって支えてもらってます。
subtitles.english: and Mizumiya always gives me energy and supports me.

subtitles.original: これからもずっと友達！
subtitles.english: Let's be friends forever!

subtitles.original: いっぱい遊んで、いっぱい楽しいことしていこうね！大好きだよ！
subtitles.english: Let's play a lot, and do lots of fun things! I love you!

subtitles.original: それでは、シガリコでした！この後もライブ楽しんでね、頑張れー！
subtitles.english: Well, that was Shigariko! Enjoy the rest of your live concert, do your best!

subtitles.original: ありがとうー！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、シガリコからメッセージが届きました。ありがとう、シガリコ。
subtitles.english: So, a message arrived from Shigariko. Thank you, Shigariko.

subtitles.original: こっちにいるかな？ありがとう、シガリコ！
subtitles.english: Are you over here? Thank you, Shigariko!

subtitles.original: いや、そう今回はね、ちょっとスケジュールが合わなくて、ちょっとリコの3Dにはね、ちょっと呼んでもらって、一緒に踊ったんですけど...
subtitles.english: Yeah, this time our schedules didn't match. I was invited to Riko's 3D stream and we danced together, but...

subtitles.original: スイのライブでは今回は踊れなかったけど、いつか一緒にまた踊ろうな。
subtitles.english: we couldn't dance together in Sui's live concert this time. But let's dance together again someday.

subtitles.original: ありがとうね、リコ！水宮頑張るよ！
subtitles.english: Thank you, Riko! Mizumiya will do her best!

subtitles.original: 応援してもらったし、ちょっと次の曲にいこうかな？
subtitles.english: Now that I've been cheered on, shall I move on to the next song?

subtitles.original: 次はゲストパートだから、誰が来るのかな？
subtitles.english: Next is the guest part, so I wonder who will come?

subtitles.original: このあとも、まだまだ続きます！そしてなんか告知もあるかもしれないので...
subtitles.english: It's still going to continue after this! And there might be some announcements too, so...

subtitles.original: 最後まで楽しんでね！
subtitles.english: enjoy until the end!

subtitles.original: 昔々の そのまた昔 とある貴族の 仲良しな兄弟
subtitles.english: Once upon a time, long, long ago, there was a noble, friendly pair of siblings.

subtitles.original: 以下略称
subtitles.english: (The rest is omitted)

subtitles.original: 「ちゃんとやれ！」
subtitles.english: "Do it properly!"

subtitles.original: じいやが呼ぶ 席につけ よーいどん！
subtitles.english: The old butler calls out, "Take your seats! Ready, set, go!"

subtitles.original: ナイフとフォークで応戦いたしますの
subtitles.english: We go to battle with knives and forks.

subtitles.original: だって僕らはブルジョアの 立派な立派な貴族様なんですですの
subtitles.english: Because we are the bourgeoisie, great, great, noble children, aren't we?

subtitles.original: ひれ伏せ愚民 君との違いを ヴァイヴァイスロイ 見せてやるぜ
subtitles.english: Bow down, you commoners! I will show you the difference between you and us, Vice Viceroy!

subtitles.original: おい まてまて また勝手にそんな 見抜けるような ハッタリかまして
subtitles.english: Hey, wait, wait! You're acting on your own again, putting on a bluff like you can see right through it.

subtitles.original: はーい はーい はいはい お兄様の仰せのままに（笑）
subtitles.english: Yes, yes, yes, yes. As you wish, Brother (lol).

subtitles.original: あーむかつくぜ！ まーじむかつくぜ！
subtitles.english: Ah, it makes me angry! It really makes me angry!

subtitles.original: 兄に対して 生意気な態度
subtitles.english: You have such a cheeky attitude toward your brother.

subtitles.original: 時の声 ゴングを鳴らせ
subtitles.english: Raise the war cry! Ring the gong!

subtitles.original: ケンカ勃発で宣戦布告
subtitles.english: Conflict breaks out, declaration of war!

subtitles.original: 悪戯して 悪ノリして
subtitles.english: Playing pranks, playing along,

subtitles.original: ほらほら 煽っていくstyleで
subtitles.english: Look, look, it's the provoking style.

subtitles.original: “大安売り”買っちゃったら<
subtitles.english: If you buy the "clearance sale",

subtitles.original: 毎度ありがとうで君の負け！
subtitles.english: thanks as always, you lose!

subtitles.original: 狙い引き出しと煽り合いの駆け引きでキメる
subtitles.english: Winning with a mix of poor drawers and teasing tactics.

subtitles.original: 兄の威厳見せるため飴と飴 火花散る散る両者の目と目
subtitles.english: To show my brotherly authority, candy and candy, sparks flying between our eyes and eyes.

subtitles.original: 俺をだれだと思ってる くらえ！おれさまがルールブック▼
subtitles.english: Who do you think I am? Eat this! I am the rulebook!

subtitles.original: へたれじゃない ひよってない ちょっと勇気が足りないだけ
subtitles.english: I'm not a coward, I'm not scared, I just lack a little courage.

subtitles.original: さぁさぁみなさん お手をお手拝借 当たり前だろ 余裕しゃくしゃく
subtitles.english: Come on, everyone, lend me your hands! It's obvious, isn't it? Relaxed and calm.

subtitles.original: 生まれながらにしてチート やべぇ煌めく 人生がスタート
subtitles.english: I'm a cheat by nature. A sparkling life begins,

subtitles.original: 当然です 見てみな由緒はガチ勢
subtitles.english: Of course it does. Look, the lineage is the real deal.

subtitles.original: ハイ論破 ハイ論破 ハイ論破 もらってくぜ Vサイン
subtitles.english: High rebuttal, high rebuttal, high rebuttal, I'll take that V-sign!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Summary**

Alright, let's break this down. My task is to produce perfect subtitles for this VTuber video, syncing Japanese and English translations *precisely* to the audio. This isn't just about translation; it's about *timing*. I need to match every syllable, every pause, to the millisecond. The output *must* be correctly structured JSON using the defined schema. This is where precision and efficiency become crucial.

First, I segmented the video. I'll need to accurately transcribe Sui's opening remarks and the guest message from Shigariko/Riko. Then, I will address the song. My reference text is crucial, but I will need to verify lyrics against the vocal performance for perfect accuracy.

I began by transcribing the initial section (00:00 - 03:21). I noted every change of topic, any relevant hashtags to include, etc. I ensured correct timecodes for the start and end of each utterance, paying close attention to phrasing, colloquialisms, and speech patterns. I'm keeping an eye on the sentiment. I was careful with translations to accurately reflect the nuances, for example in "かっこよかっただろ？" (It was cool, right?) and how this sounds more casual and enthusiastic in Japanese than it might literally translate. The guest message was also transcribed with care, picking up on the greetings, the relationship between the two speakers, etc.

I then moved on to the song "Okochama Sensou". I made an initial pass with timestamps for the reference text, but I made sure to refine them. I will need to adjust for precise vocal timing - these are often slightly off, and a very small deviation can make for badly synced subtitles. I've listened repeatedly to ensure each word matches the audio. For example, I noticed a deviation with the lyrics in one line, and will make sure to correct for the actual sung word. I will be very meticulous about this part to make sure the subtitles really 'pop' on screen.

I am re-checking the entire timecode format and output requirements to make certain there are no errors.

Once I have everything transcribed and timed, I'll organize the text into the correct JSON format for the final result, and I will ensure the formatting is perfect.
